Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Undroidwish – a single-file, batteries-included Tcl/Tk binary for many platforms 70 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. OpenBSD on Motorola 88000 Processors 57 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. I Built an Open-World Engine for the N64 [video] 366 upvotes, 61 comments
  4. The 667MHz Machine 22 upvotes, 1 comments
  5. Founder of GitLab battles cancer by founding companies 764 upvotes, 177 comments
  6. Linux is an interpreter 170 upvotes, 33 comments
  7. Memory That Collaborates 27 upvotes, 2 comments
  8. Detecting file changes on macOS with kqueue 68 upvotes, 11 comments
  9. My heuristics are wrong. What now? 45 upvotes, 6 comments
  10. CSS is DOOMed 221 upvotes, 51 comments
  11. Spanish legislation as a Git repo 695 upvotes, 214 comments
  12. Meta Partners with Arm to Develop New Class of Data Center Silicon 47 upvotes, 9 comments
  13. A Verilog to Factorio Compiler and Simulator (Working RISC-V CPU) 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  14. Improved Git Diffs with Delta, Fzf and a Little Shell Scripting 127 upvotes, 35 comments
  15. OpenCiv1 – open-source rewrite of Civ1 105 upvotes, 30 comments
  16. I decompiled the White House's new app 408 upvotes, 149 comments
  17. Sealing Paper Packaging Without Adhesives 37 upvotes, 8 comments
  18. Cat Itecture: Better Cat Window Boxes 17 upvotes, 2 comments
  19. Show HN: PeriodicTableOfElements.org 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. The first 40 months of the AI era 131 upvotes, 63 comments
  21. South Korea Mandates Solar Panels for Public Parking Lots 230 upvotes, 124 comments
  22. Private equity turned vulnerable elderly people into human ATMs 126 upvotes, 73 comments
  23. Alzheimer's disease mortality among taxi and ambulance drivers (2024) 47 upvotes, 22 comments
  24. AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice 548 upvotes, 415 comments
  25. Further human + AI + proof assistant work on Knuth's "Claude Cycles" problem 161 upvotes, 109 comments
  26. Stop picking my Go version for me 31 upvotes, 24 comments
  27. 1929: Inside the Greatest Crash in Wall Street History 52 upvotes, 46 comments
  28. Will the AI data centre boom become a $9T bust? 16 upvotes, 10 comments
  29. Google just gave Android power users a sideloading win 55 upvotes, 56 comments
  30. InpharmD (YC W21) Is Hiring – Senior Ruby on Rails Developer 0 upvotes, 0 comments
